allow: PowerShell($p = 'C:\\Users\\CarlosRafaelResendes\\jarvis-pap\\frontend\\src\\servicos\\wakeword.js'; $c = Get-Content $p -Raw -Encoding utf8; $c = $c -replace '\\.replace\\\(/\\[.{1,4}\\]/g, ''''\\\) // remove acentos \\\(diacríticos combinados\\\)', '.replace\(/[̀-ͯ]/g, ''''\) // remove acentos \(diacriticos combinados\)'; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($p, $c, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); Select-String -Path $p -Pattern 'u0300')

PowerShell($p = 'C:\\Users\\CarlosRafaelResendes\\jarvis-pap\\frontend\\src\\servicos\\wakeword.js'; $linhas = Get-Content $p -Encoding utf8; $linhas[22] = "    .replace\(/[̀-ͯ]/g, ''\) // remove acentos \(diacriticos combinados\)"; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllLines\($p, $linhas, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); \(Get-Content $p -Encoding utf8\)[22])

PowerShell($corpo = @{ device_id = "teste-deploy-carlos-0001"; session_id = "sessao-teste-deploy-01"; mensagem = "Ola JARVIS, apresenta-te numa frase." } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://lewist.pythonanywhere.com/chat" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $corpo -TimeoutSec 60; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Output "ERRO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.ErrorDetails.Message\) { Write-Output $_.ErrorDetails.Message } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://qylludljdogjeggoskgf.supabase.co/rest/v1/" -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $codigo = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; Write-Output "HTTP $codigo \(esperado 401 = URL valido, so falta chave\)" })

PowerShell($corpo = @{ device_id = "teste-deploy-carlos-0001"; session_id = "sessao-teste-deploy-01"; mensagem = "Ola JARVIS, apresenta-te numa frase." } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://lewist.pythonanywhere.com/chat" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $corpo -TimeoutSec 90; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Output "ERRO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.ErrorDetails.Message\) { Write-Output $_.ErrorDetails.Message } })

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\CarlosRafaelResendes\\jarvis-pap; $ficheiros = @\('.env.example', 'backend\\.env.example', 'DEPLOY.md'\); foreach \($f in $ficheiros\) { \(Get-Content $f -Raw -Encoding utf8\) -replace 'claude-3-5-haiku-20241022', 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001' | Set-Content $f -NoNewline -Encoding utf8 }; Select-String -Path $ficheiros -Pattern "ANTHROPIC_MODEL" | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Filename\): $\($_.Line\)" })
